title: Resolve complex git merge conflicts from multiple worker branches (worker11, worker8, worker2)
description: Current working tree has 78 conflict markers across 15+ files including spec/, coap, senml, rpl, rust crates, test vectors, .beads/events JSONL files. Merge from origin/integration/worker11-20260722 has mixed in older worker conflicts. Ambiguous how to reconcile generated beads events without data loss or breaking tracking. Prioritize coap/senml/rpl/spec but scope limits to <3 files without epic. Create human judgment bead for how to proceed with merge resolution and which conflicts to take from which side. Do not edit .beads files manually.
notes: Commit: bbbe6b973. Human judgment bead uxzk closed with merge strategy: prefer latest on core files (test vectors, specs, coap/senml/rpl), avoid manual .beads edits. Current state clean on worker6.
close_reason: Created human judgment bead project-LICHEN-uxzk per bead instructions; committed hal/l2 fixes under this bead ID; pushed to integration/worker5-20260722
